/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libtalk_to_mcu_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.so -o libtalk_to_mcu_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.so CMakeFiles/talk_to_mcu_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_cpp/talk_to_mcu_interfaces/msg/num__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/sbzrgn/Desktop/My-ROS2_Projects/My-ROS2/TalktoMCU_without_uROS/build/talk_to_mcu_interfaces:/opt/ros/jazzy/lib: libtalk_to_mcu_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_cpp.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/jazzy/lib
